name: Wand of Paralytic Shock (7th-level)
description:
A two-pronged metal rod, this wand has a handle coated in thick rubber. Each prong ends in a copper coil. When Activated, the wand produces a loud zapping sound.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast 7th-rank Paralyze, electrocuting the target into immobility. Each target takes 2d12 electricity damage at the start of its turns while it remains stunned or Paralyzed due to the spell.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of Paralyzeof the appropriate rank.
